runTitle: Local AI Engine Command Guidance Resource Intent QA
coveredSurfaces: AI supervisor stream direct command guidance

completedImprovements.title: AI disk cleanup guidance should prioritize filesystem cleanup commands before MySQL diagnostics
completedImprovements.evidence: Targeted AI Engine tests verify db-mysql disk capacity command guidance now returns df -h and du -xhd1 before service-specific diagnostics; NFS disk cleanup uses filesystem capacity checks before remounts; CPU and memory generic command routing no longer pulls unrelated service commands.
completedImprovements.note: Validation: targeted Vitest 3 files / 35 tests, AI Engine type-check, AI Engine full test 107 files / 1085 tests, root test:contract 3 files / 24 tests, static command-catalog probe for 9 representative prompts.

notes: This is a local deterministic QA record for the command guidance resource-intent fix; production deployment and live LLM QA were intentionally skipped until the next release.
The fix keeps service-specific paths for MySQL slow query, Nginx 5xx, and NFS remount guidance while prioritizing filesystem commands for disk capacity cleanup.
